backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor for the PaarWeg backend, implementing access control (admin/user roles), user profile management, page content storage, pricing entries, and CSR info, with blob storage mixed in.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two requirements: updating the heading and body text of the 'wieder zueinander finden' section on both BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx and ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx with new German content about partnership clarity.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of each page, component, and hook in the project.
frontend/ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration that enables serving the .well-known directory (used for domain verification) without ignoring it.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PaarWeg React app, setting German language, SEO meta description for online couples coaching, and including Plausible Analytics tracking for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing paarweg.com and www.paarweg.com as the canonical domains for the Internet Computer deployment.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap for www.paarweg.com listing all public URLs including the homepage, location-specific landing pages (Zürich, Basel, online), service pages, and legal page with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that defines all TanStack Router routes (including Zürich, Basel, and Swiss online landing pages) and wraps the app with ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ThemeHexCo: Admin UI card component that displays runtime-computed HEX color values for the page background and primary CTA button, with copy-to-clipboard functionality for each color.
frontend/src/components/CalendlyInlineWi: Empty file placeholder for a Calendly inline widget component with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component providing a sticky header with desktop and mobile navigation, special reload logic for the Kontakt page, instant scroll-to-top on route changes, and a footer with Basel headquarters info.
frontend/src/components/MobileReadMore.t: Mobile-only collapsible content component that truncates long text behind a 'Mehr anzeigen' toggle button with a gradient fade, controlled by a feature flag to enable or disable compacting behavior.
frontend/src/config/featureFlags.ts: Centralized feature flag configuration object; currently defines a single flag to enable or disable mobile 'Read more / Show less' content compacting behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendlyScript.ts: React hook that lazily injects the Calendly external widget script and CSS into the document and returns a boolean indicating when the widget is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useComputedThemeHexCo: React hook that reads runtime computed styles from temporary DOM probe elements to derive HEX values for the theme's background and primary button colors, recomputing on dark mode changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching hardcoded CSR metadata and generating a PKCS#10 CSR client-side using the Web Crypto API with RSA-2048 signing.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's warm sand/terracotta color theme, plus base typography and mobile text-wrapping rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page for Roland Soder, displaying his bio, credentials, and coaching philosophy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section with photo.
frontend/src/pages/BaselCouplesLandingPa: Landing page targeting couples in Basel for pair counseling services, featuring a video hero, SEO/OG meta tags, and a scoped Google Ads tag that loads and cleans up on mount/unmount.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and appointment booking page with SEO/OG meta tags, direct contact info (email/phone), and an embedded Calendly scheduling section along with an FAQ accordion.
frontend/src/pages/CouplesPage.tsx: Service page describing couples coaching offerings with SEO/OG meta tags, a hero section with a collapsible mobile read-more, feature cards, and a Calendly booking CTA.
frontend/src/pages/CSRGeneratorPage.tsx: Admin/utility page that auto-generates an SSL Certificate Signing Request (CSR) on load using a React Query mutation, then displays the CSR and public key with copy and download options.
frontend/src/pages/DomainVerificationPag: Fetches and displays the status of the `/.well-known/ic-domains` file, showing success, error, or checking state to verify Internet Computer domain configuration for www.paarweg.com.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page for PaarWeg that sets SEO metadata (title, Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD structured data) and renders the hero section and feature cards for the coaching service.
frontend/src/pages/LegalPage.tsx: Displays the Impressum (legal notice) and Datenschutz (privacy policy) information for Roland Soder Coaching, including contact details, liability disclaimers, and copyright notice.
frontend/src/pages/MenPage.tsx: Coaching page targeting men in relationships, setting relevant SEO/OG metadata and rendering a hero section with collapsible text, feature cards, and call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page showing coaching session costs (190 CHF / 90 min) and a free intro call, with SEO metadata, Twitter Card tags, and an FAQ accordion covering common billing questions.
frontend/src/pages/SitemapPage.tsx: Renders a human-readable XML sitemap listing all public PaarWeg URLs with priorities and change frequencies, intended for submission to Google Search Console.
frontend/src/pages/SwissOnlineCouplesLan: Landing page for online couples counseling targeting all of Switzerland, with SEO meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a video hero section with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalStatusPage.t: Admin/diagnostic page that runs and displays status checks for DNS, SSL, WWW CNAME, 301 redirects, analytics, and domain resolution for the paarweg.com deployment.
frontend/src/pages/WomenPage.tsx: Landing page offering relationship coaching specifically for women, with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and a hero section describing the service.
frontend/src/pages/ZurichCouplesLandingP: Location-specific landing page for couples counseling in Zürich, with SEO meta tags, a scoped Google Analytics tag, and a video hero section with play/mute controls.
frontend/src/types/calendly.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file that extends the global Window interface with Calendly widget methods for inline and popup scheduling widgets.
frontend/src/utils/color.ts: Utility module providing functions to convert computed CSS color strings (rgb, rgba, oklch) into uppercase HEX format.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the PaarWeg couples coaching website project, recording completed features (text updates on Basel and Zürich landing pages) and a pending action request to update the heading and body text on both city pages.
